summary: Completed testing of Balance de Tallas (por Item) feature. Backend: 22/22 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All features verified - matrix table loads with items and tallas, row click shows color detail panel, all filters work (Tienda, Marca, Tipo, Entalle, Tela, Hilo, Talla, Color, Modelo), Reset button clears filters and selection, CSV export buttons present, nav link exists in sidebar.

issues: React hydration warnings in console (span inside table elements) - cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality. Same issue as StockDashboard.jsx - caused by dynamic content wrapping.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/stock-balance/matrix returns 200 with auth
Backend: Matrix response contains required fields (tallas, rows, totals_by_talla, grand_total, total_items, filter_opts)
Backend: tallas is a sorted list with 13 sizes
Backend: rows have correct structure (marca, tipo, entalle, tela, hilo, values dict, total)
Backend: totals_by_talla is a dict with numeric values
Backend: grand_total is numeric
Backend: total_items returns 229 items
Backend: filter_opts contains all expected keys (tienda, marca, tipo, entalle, tela, hilo, color, talla)
Backend: Marca filter works correctly
Backend: Tienda filter works correctly
Backend: Tipo filter works correctly
Backend: Multiple filters can be combined
Backend: Pagination params (limit, page) work
Backend: GET /api/stock-balance/colors-matrix without params returns empty
Backend: Colors-matrix returns data for selected item with correct structure
Backend: Color rows have correct structure (color, values dict, total)
Backend: Color totals sum matches grand_total
Backend: Matrix endpoint requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: Colors endpoint requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: Item total equals sum of talla values (data integrity)
Backend: totals_by_talla equals sum of column values (data integrity)
Backend: grand_total equals sum of row totals (data integrity)
Frontend: Navigate to /balance-tallas page via sidebar nav link
Frontend: Matrix table loads with 229 items and 13 tallas
Frontend: Click row shows color detail panel on the right
Frontend: All filter dropdowns open and can select options (Tienda, Marca, Tipo, etc)
Frontend: Filter chips appear when filter is active
Frontend: Reset button clears filters and selection
Frontend: Close button on color detail panel works
Frontend: CSV export buttons present on both panels
Frontend: All data-testid attributes working correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Balance de Tallas implementation is CORRECT: Matrix shows MARCA-TIPO-ENTALLE-TELA-HILO x tallas with SUM(available_qty)
Colors-matrix correctly shows color breakdown for selected item
All filters (tienda, marca, tipo, entalle, tela, hilo, color, talla, modelo) work correctly
Pagination with limit=300 and page params works
React hydration warnings (span in table) are cosmetic - doesn't affect functionality
data-testid attributes are properly implemented for all interactive elements
seed_data_creation: None - used existing PostgreSQL data (real stock data from crm.v_stock_balance_flat view)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Balance de Tallas (por Item) feature fully tested. The report shows a matrix of items (MARCA-TIPO-ENTALLE-TELA-HILO) x tallas with SUM(available_qty). Clicking an item row shows a color detail panel on the right. All filters work: tienda, marca, tipo, entalle, tela, hilo, color, talla, modelo. Reset button clears selection and filters. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_balance_tallas.py covers all API endpoints and data integrity. Frontend uses data-testid attributes: balance-tallas-page, balance-filter-bar, balance-left-panel, balance-right-panel, balance-row-{i}, balance-reset-all, balance-export-left, balance-export-right, balance-close-right, nav-balance-de-tallas.
